paragraphs.text: Businesses often do not understand anything about what we are in with the video games, do not understand that, as much as an Always Online will always have their niche community ready to keep it alive, even if servers are closed, they do not understand the charities and hours they have given their community to their games and pay for it? We just want us to give us the opportunity to revive those games, which may be the childhood and teenage of many people going beyond that, which make the nights of life with friends or simply give us a moment of eviction to someone who had a bad day. What happened to “The Crew” is an example of killing the love a community had to you just to move to the most current game “”, that is just playing dirty with people’s feelings and just thinking about money, companies and developers must give the codes of the game so that servers can be revived and that your community that has been for years remains true to you. SKG is a hope to make people who have paid for an Always Online still have the opportunity to enjoy it as if it were the first day, a fans miracle for fans.
